passive.name: Flowing Ruin
passive.description: After using a skill, gain 1 Flowing Ruin stack. At 3 stacks, the next skill will consume all stacks to deal 50% more damage and apply a debuff that reduces the target's ATK by 20% for 2 turns.

mechanics.name: Flowing Ruin Stack
mechanics.description: Grants 1 Flowing Ruin stack. Max 3 stacks.

mechanics.name: Flowing Ruin Empowerment
mechanics.description: At 3 stacks, the next skill consumes all stacks to deal 50% more damage and applies a debuff that reduces the target's ATK by 20% for 2 turns.
